name: Minimum Valid Packet
description: Smallest valid packet with empty payload. Tests CRC algorithm with minimal input.
purpose: Boundary condition: verify algorithm correctness with minimal data

verification.notes: This vector must be generated by running the actual firmware code. Do not calculate manually. Do not infer from byte order assumptions. Execute and capture the output.

expected_complete_packet.description: Complete packet bytes including CRC and footer
expected_complete_packet.structure: Header(2) + Seq(1) + Cmd(1) + Len(2) + Payload(0) + CRC(2) + Footer(1) = 9 bytes total

interoperability.requirement: All implementations must produce identical bytes (0-7) and footer (0xAA)
interoperability.not_just_crc: Complete packet bytes must match, not just CRC value

testing_notes: Use this vector to verify CRC16 implementation in daemon
After firmware verification provides expected CRC, implement daemon CRC and test against this vector
Integration test should send this packet from daemon and verify firmware processes it correctly
If any implementation differs, it indicates a bug in that implementation
